The '''SC-4 blaster pistol''' was a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] design created by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] use.

Inside the grip of each blaster, there was a tracking device, which transmitted when and where the blaster was fired through a planet's global positioning network to an Imperial tracking [[Computer/Legends|computer]].
